name: Health Potion
description: A red concoction that restores vitality. Common fare for adventurers.

name: Iron Luck Charm
description: A crude charm said to bring minor fortune.

name: Faerie Tea
description: Ethereal brew from the fae. Grants fleeting clarity and a hint of otherworldly blessing.

name: Dwarven Ale
description: Stout mountain brew. Dwarves consider it essential for any journey.

name: Stolen Goods
description: An assortment of pilfered trinkets. Best sold quickly and quietly.

name: Warden Signet
description: A seal of the Warden order. Only bearers of this ring may wield sanctioned warder arms.
